client.brand_name: String — Legal or commonly known brand name
client.industry: String — Industry vertical (e.g., FinTech, Beauty, SaaS, QSR, Automotive)
client.brand_guidelines_url: URL — Link to brand kit or style guide PDF
logo_assets_url: URL — Transparent PNG/SVG logo files. Provide horizontal, vertical, and icon-only variants if available
existing_ad_references: URL — Links to the brand's previous ads that represent desired quality or direction
competitor_references: URL — Links to competitor ads the client wants to match, beat, or deliberately avoid

product.name: String — Exact product or service name as it should appear on screen
product.category: String — Product category (e.g., Mobile App, Skincare Serum, SaaS Platform, Sneaker)
product.tagline: String — Established brand or campaign tagline, if any
product.usp: String — Single unique selling proposition. Must be strictly singular for a 10s ad
product.price_point: String — Price or price range (e.g., '$29/mo', '$199', 'Starting at $49'). Leave empty if not featured in ad
key_features: String — Top 2-3 features worth highlighting. Only the strongest will survive the 10s cut

images_url: URL — High-res lifestyle or product images
product_assets.3d_model_url: URL — 3D model file if animation or rotation is needed
product_assets.packshot_url: URL — Clean pack shot on transparent/neutral background for end card

campaign.goal: Enum [awareness, consideration, conversion, retargeting, launch, seasonal, app_install, event_promo] — Primary campaign objective
campaign.kpi: String — Key performance indicator (e.g., CTR, CPA, ROAS, Installs, Video completion rate)

offer.has_offer: Boolean — Whether the ad features a promotional offer
offer.offer_text: String — Short offer text (e.g., '20% Off', 'Free Shipping', 'Buy 1 Get 1'). Keep under 5 words for quick readability
offer.promo_code: String — Promo code to display on screen, if any
offer.expiry_date: ISO Date — Offer expiry date. Used for urgency framing

cta.text: String — Call-to-action copy (e.g., 'Shop Now', 'Download Free', 'Learn More', 'Use Code')
cta.url: URL — Landing page or deep link the CTA points to
cta.button_style: String — Visual style for CTA button (e.g., 'solid_fill', 'outline', 'text_only', 'animated_pulse')

target_cohort.user_intent: Enum [cold_audience, warm_prospect, retargeting, existing_customer] — Funnel stage of the audience. A cold audience ad looks fundamentally different from a retargeting ad even if the campaign goal is the same

demographics.gender: Enum [all, male, female, non_binary] — Primary gender targeting
locations: String — Target geographies (countries, states, cities, DMAs)
languages: String — Spoken/written languages for the ad content
demographics.income_bracket: Enum [low, middle, upper_middle, high, luxury] — Household income bracket

behaviors: String — Behavioral signals (e.g., 'Frequent online shoppers', 'Early adopters', 'Mobile gamers')
pain_points: String — Specific problems this audience has that the product solves
psychographics.lifestyle: String — General lifestyle descriptor (e.g., 'Urban professional', 'College student', 'New parent')

target_cohort.device_preference: Enum [mobile, desktop, tablet, ctv, all] — Primary device the audience will view the ad on. Impacts safe zones and text sizing

personalization_tokens.use_viewer_name: Boolean — Dynamically insert viewer's first name into the ad
personalization_tokens.use_viewer_location: Boolean — Dynamically insert viewer's city or region
personalization_tokens.use_viewer_company: Boolean — Dynamically insert viewer's company name (B2B use case)

custom_tokens.value: String — Default/fallback value if personalization data is unavailable

platforms: Enum [instagram_reels, instagram_stories, tiktok, youtube_shorts, youtube_preroll, youtube_bumper, facebook_feed, facebook_stories, snapchat, pinterest, ctv, display, linkedin, twitter_x, other] — All platforms this ad will run on. Each may need its own export
aspect_ratios: Enum [9:16, 16:9, 1:1, 4:5] — Required aspect ratios. 9:16 for vertical-first platforms, 16:9 for YouTube/CTV
delivery.fps: Enum [24, 30, 60] — Frame rate. 30fps is standard for social, 24fps for cinematic feel, 60fps for high-motion
file_formats: Enum [mp4, mov, webm, gif] — Required output formats

safe_zones.platform_ui_overlay_margins: Boolean — Whether to keep critical content away from platform UI elements (e.g., TikTok buttons, YouTube progress bar)
safe_zones.subtitle_safe_area: Boolean — Whether to reserve bottom area for subtitle/caption text

creative_direction.overall_theme: String — High-level creative theme (e.g., 'High-energy lifestyle', 'Sleek minimalist tech', 'Raw & authentic UGC', 'Luxury editorial')
creative_direction.tone: Enum [humorous, serious, inspirational, edgy, luxurious, casual, urgent, nostalgic, playful, authoritative, asmr, sarcastic, wholesome] — Tonal register of the ad
creative_direction.visual_style: Enum [live_action, animation_2d, animation_3d, motion_graphics, mixed_media, stop_motion, ai_generated, stock_composite, ugc_native, screen_capture] — Primary production style
creative_direction.pacing: Enum [fast_cuts, slow_build, single_shot, dynamic_accelerating, rhythmic] — Edit rhythm. Fast cuts for high-energy, single shot for UGC authenticity

the_hook.description: Object — The single most important creative element. What happens in seconds 0.0–1.5 to stop the scroll. This field is mandatory — if the hook fails, the remaining 8.5 seconds are irrelevant.
the_hook.type: Enum [visual_surprise, bold_claim, question, product_in_action, pattern_interrupt, relatable_moment, sound_hook, text_hook] — Hook mechanic category
the_hook.content: String — Specific description of what happens (e.g., 'Product smashes through a wall of competitor products', 'Close-up of satisfying texture pull', 'Bold white text on black: YOU'RE DOING IT WRONG')
the_hook.audio_element: String — What the viewer HEARS in the first 1.5 seconds (e.g., 'Record scratch', 'Whispered question', 'Loud crunch SFX', 'Silence then bass drop')

reference_ads.url: URL — Link to a reference ad
reference_ads.what_to_reference: String — What specifically to take from this reference (e.g., 'The color grading', 'The transition style', 'The text animation only')

mandatory_inclusions: String — Non-negotiable elements that must appear (e.g., 'Product must be shown within first 3 seconds', 'Logo on screen for final 2 seconds')
strict_exclusions: String — Hard no's (e.g., 'No competitor mentions', 'No red color', 'No children in the ad', 'No stock footage')

color_palette.primary: Hex — Dominant brand color used for key visual elements
color_palette.accent: Hex — Pop color for CTAs, highlights, and emphasis
color_palette.background: Hex — Default background color or tone
color_palette.text_color: Hex — Primary text color for on-screen copy
color_palette.use_brand_colors_only: Boolean — If true, no colors outside the brand palette are permitted

typography.primary_font: String — Main headline/display font (e.g., 'Montserrat Bold', 'Helvetica Neue')

headline_style.weight: Enum [bold, semibold, regular, light] — Font weight for headlines
headline_style.case: Enum [uppercase, lowercase, sentence_case, title_case] — Text casing for headlines
headline_style.max_chars: Integer — Maximum character count per headline line to ensure readability at speed

subtitle_style.background: Enum [none, solid, gradient, blur] — Subtitle background treatment for legibility

scene_breakdown.scene_number: Integer — Sequential scene number starting from 1
scene_breakdown.start_time: Float — Scene start timestamp in seconds (e.g., 0.0)
scene_breakdown.end_time: Float — Scene end timestamp in seconds (e.g., 2.5)
scene_breakdown.visual_description: String — Detailed description of what is visually happening on screen
scene_breakdown.on_screen_text: String — Exact text displayed on screen during this scene. Keep each line under 6 words for scannability
scene_breakdown.text_animation: Enum [fade_in, slide_up, slide_left, typewriter, pop, glitch, kinetic, none] — How the on-screen text enters

dialogue.speaker: String — Character or narrator identifier
dialogue.line: String — Exact spoken line. Total VO across all scenes must stay within 15-25 words for a 10s ad
dialogue.delivery_note: String — Direction for voice performance (e.g., 'Whispered with urgency', 'Deadpan', 'Excited rising pitch')

camera.shot_type: Enum [extreme_close_up, close_up, medium_close_up, medium, medium_wide, wide, extreme_wide, overhead, pov, dutch_angle] — Framing of the shot
camera.movement: Enum [static, pan_left, pan_right, tilt_up, tilt_down, zoom_in, zoom_out, tracking, dolly_in, dolly_out, orbit, handheld_shake, crane_up] — Camera motion during the scene
camera.transition_in: Enum [cut, dissolve, wipe, zoom, whip_pan, morph, glitch, match_cut, j_cut, l_cut, none] — How this scene transitions from the previous one

end_card.duration_seconds: Float — How long the end card is visible (typically 1.5-2.5s of the total 10s)
end_card.logo_placement: Enum [center, bottom_center, bottom_left, bottom_right, top_right, top_left] — Logo position on end card
end_card.text: String — End card copy (e.g., tagline, URL, or promo code)
end_card.cta_button: Boolean — Whether to render a visible CTA button on the end card

characters.talent_type: Enum [real_actor, voiceover_only, ai_avatar, animated_character, ugc_style_creator, hand_model, no_talent] — Primary talent approach

cast.description: String — Brief character description and purpose in the story
cast.ethnicity: String — Ethnicity or appearance notes for casting. Specify 'diverse/open' if no preference
cast.wardrobe: String — Clothing and styling direction (e.g., 'Casual streetwear in brand colors', 'Corporate attire', 'Gym wear')
cast.demeanor: String — How the character carries themselves (e.g., 'Confident and relaxed', 'Frazzled then relieved', 'Playfully skeptical')

voiceover.enabled: Boolean — Whether the ad includes spoken voiceover
voiceover.age: String — Apparent age of the voice (e.g., 'Young adult', 'Mature', '30s')
voiceover.accent: String — Accent or dialect (e.g., 'Neutral American', 'British RP', 'Australian', 'AAVE')
voiceover.tone: String — Vocal delivery style (e.g., 'Energetic', 'Calm and authoritative', 'Conversational', 'Whispery ASMR')
voiceover.language: String — Spoken language for the VO
voiceover.script: String — Full VO script. STRICT LIMIT: 15-25 words max for a 10s ad
voiceover.ai_voice_id: String — Specific AI voice model ID if using synthetic VO (e.g., ElevenLabs voice ID)

music.style: String — Music genre or style (e.g., 'Lo-fi hip hop', 'Epic orchestral', 'Upbeat pop', 'Corporate tech', 'Trap beat')
music.tempo: Enum [slow, medium, fast, builds_to_climax] — Tempo. 'builds_to_climax' works well with CTA timing
music.mood: String — Emotional quality of the music (e.g., 'Triumphant', 'Chill', 'Mysterious', 'Playful')
music.licensed_track: String — Specific licensed track name/artist if pre-selected

sfx.timestamp: Float — When the SFX triggers in seconds
sfx.description: String — Sound effect description (e.g., 'Swoosh on transition', 'Cash register ding on price reveal', 'Satisfying click on CTA')

audio.audio_mix_priority: Enum [voiceover, music, sfx] — Which audio layer takes priority in the mix. VO-first means music ducks under speech

disclaimers: String — Required legal disclaimers (e.g., 'Results may vary', 'T&Cs apply', 'Minimum purchase required')
legal_compliance.disclaimer_placement: Enum [bottom_text, end_card, voiceover, superimposed] — Where disclaimers appear
legal_compliance.age_gate_required: Boolean — Whether the ad requires age verification (alcohol, gambling, etc.)
country_restrictions: String — Countries where this ad cannot run due to legal/regulatory constraints
legal_compliance.platform_ad_policies_reviewed: Boolean — Confirmation that the creative has been reviewed against target platform ad policies
requires_client_approval_stages: Enum [concept, storyboard, rough_cut, color_grade, final] — Approval gates before final delivery
legal_compliance.usage_rights_duration: String — How long the brand has rights to use this creative (e.g., '6 months', '1 year', 'In perpetuity')
legal_compliance.talent_release_secured: Boolean — Whether model/talent release forms have been signed

versions_needed.language: String — Target language for this version (e.g., 'Spanish', 'Mandarin')
versions_needed.adapted_script: String — Translated and culturally adapted VO/text script
versions_needed.cultural_notes: String — Cultural adaptations needed (e.g., 'Use local holiday reference instead of Christmas', 'Mirror image for RTL layout')

timeline.brief_received: ISO Date — Date the brief was received from client
timeline.rough_cut_due: ISO Date — First rough cut delivery deadline
timeline.final_delivery: ISO Date — Final approved asset delivery deadline
timeline.revision_rounds_included: Integer — Number of revision rounds included in the scope
